name: Intro to C#
description: A course about the basics of C#
about: This course is about the basics of C#

name: Advanced JavaScript
description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript patterns and ES6+
about: Master closures, async/await, modules, and design patterns in JavaScript.

name: Python for Beginners
description: Learn Python syntax, data structures, and problem solving
about: Write clean Python scripts using variables, loops, functions, and OOP basics.

name: Java Fundamentals
description: Build a strong foundation in Java programming
about: Cover Java syntax, OOP, collections, and exception handling with hands-on labs.

name: Full-Stack Web Development
description: Build complete web apps with frontend and backend skills
about: Learn HTML, CSS, React, and ASP.NET Core to ship production-ready web applications.

name: React Fundamentals
description: Learn React from scratch with hooks and component design
about: Build interactive UIs with React components, hooks, and state management.

name: ASP.NET Core Web APIs
description: Design and build RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core
about: Create secure, scalable Web APIs using controllers, EF Core, and authentication.

name: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Create native iOS apps using Swift and SwiftUI
about: Design and ship iOS applications with Swift, SwiftUI, and Apple frameworks.

name: Android Development with Kotlin
description: Build Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose
about: Learn Kotlin, Android Studio, and Jetpack Compose to create modern mobile apps.

name: Data Science with Python
description: Analyze data using Python, pandas, and visualization tools
about: Explore data wrangling, statistical analysis, and visualization with Python.

name: Machine Learning Essentials
description: Introduction to supervised and unsupervised learning
about: Understand core ML algorithms, model evaluation, and practical pipelines.

name: Deep Learning with Neural Networks
description: Build and train neural networks for real-world problems
about: Cover CNNs, RNNs, and transfer learning with hands-on coding projects.

name: Ethical Hacking Basics
description: Learn penetration testing and secure coding fundamentals
about: Practice ethical hacking techniques, vulnerability scanning, and secure coding.

name: SQL and Relational Databases
description: Master SQL queries, joins, and database design
about: Design schemas, write efficient queries, and manage relational databases.

name: NoSQL with MongoDB
description: Store and query document data with MongoDB
about: Learn document modeling, aggregation pipelines, and indexing in MongoDB.

name: Cloud Computing with AWS
description: Deploy and manage applications on Amazon Web Services
about: Learn EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, and cloud architecture best practices.

name: DevOps and CI/CD Pipelines
description: Automate builds, tests, and deployments with modern DevOps tools
about: Use Docker, GitHub Actions, and infrastructure as code to streamline delivery.

name: Docker and Kubernetes
description: Containerize apps and orchestrate them at scale
about: Build images with Docker and deploy workloads with Kubernetes.

name: Software Engineering Principles
description: Apply SOLID, design patterns, and agile practices
about: Learn clean code, architecture, testing strategies, and team collaboration.

name: Algorithms and Data Structures
description: Solve problems with arrays, trees, graphs, and sorting
about: Practice coding interviews and algorithmic thinking with real problems.

name: TypeScript for Developers
description: Add strong typing and safer patterns to JavaScript projects
about: Learn types, interfaces, generics, and TypeScript tooling for real apps.

name: Git and Version Control
description: Collaborate effectively with Git branching and workflows
about: Master commits, branches, merges, pull requests, and team Git workflows.
